news.headline: Mobix Labs reports strong Q1 2025 results with continued revenue growth; CEO cites strategic acquisitions & product expansion.
news.summary: Irvine-based company Mobix Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOBX) revealed its fiscal performance for the initial quarter of 2025 that concluded on December 31, 2024. CEO Fabian Battaglia expressed satisfaction with the robust beginning to the fiscal year, highlighting ongoing revenue expansion. The firm's success was credited to strategic acquisitions and the broadening product range, which stimulated demand in crucial industries.

news.headline: Casey's to report Q3 fiscal 2025 results on March 11 and hold conference call on March 12 at 7:30 am central time.
news.summary: An Iowa-based convenience store chain, Casey’s General Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ: CASY), is set to release its third quarter fiscal 2025 results on March 11th, 2025, after the market closes. The company, a prominent player in the U.S. convenience store industry, will conduct a conference call and webcast on March 12th at 7:30 am Central Time to discuss the financial outcomes. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the event through Casey’s website on the Investor Relations page at https://investor.caseys.com.

news.headline: PotlatchDeltic executives presenting at 3 investor conferences. Time for first conference: 1:15 PM Eastern on Feb. 27.
news.summary: Spokane, Washington - PotlatchDeltic Corporation (Nasdaq: PCH) disclosed that Eric J. Cremers, President and CEO, along with Wayne Wasechek, VP and CFO, will present a company overview at three Investor Conferences. These presentations are set for the 2025 BofA Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 27 at 1:15 PM ET, and the 46th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference.

news.headline: Alume Biosciences names Kaveri Parker Chief Business Officer, enhancing their nerve technology.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Alume Biosciences, a biotechnology company in late-clinical stage, revealed the appointment of Kaveri Parker, Ph.D., as their new Chief Business Officer. The company specializes in developing nerve illuminating technology aimed at enhancing surgical safety. Dr. Parker's role will involve overseeing strategic business operations for the company.

news.headline: Kroger offers Express Delivery for fast online shopping, bringing store items to customers' doors in a pinch. #Kroger #ExpressDelivery #FastestOnlineDelivery
news.summary: A renowned retailer, The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), announced the introduction of its Express Delivery service on February 18, 2025, in Cincinnati. The service prides itself on providing swift online deliveries comparable to in-store shopping, reiterating that customers can avail themselves of the same prices. This expedited service aims to cater to customers who require urgent delivery of items from the store directly to their doorstep.

news.headline: Zhang Financial, #1 Independent Financial Advisor, opens office in Chicago at the John Hancock Building.
news.summary: A well-known fee-only wealth management firm, Zhang Financial, has recently inaugurated its new office in Chicago on February 18, 2025. Situated in the prestigious John Hancock Building at 875 North Michigan Avenue, this development signifies a notable achievement for the company.

news.headline: Red Canary named to CRN's 2025 Security 100 List in Endpoint and Managed Security category. Prestigious industry award.
news.summary: A prominent company in managed detection and response (MDR) has initiated its new fiscal year by receiving a prestigious industry award in the Endpoint and Managed Security category. On February 18, 2025, in Denver, Red Canary, a leading MDR provider, was acknowledged by CRN® for its excellence.

news.headline: GasTech Engineering partners with Limitless Space Institute to support STEM program, inspiring young innovators. Chairman of Axiom Space, Kam Ghaffarian, leads initiative.
news.summary: GasTech Engineering has recently revealed their sponsorship of the Limitless Space Institute (LSI), a renowned STEM initiative established by Kam Ghaffarian, the chairman of Axiom Space. The program aims to inspire and educate individuals in the fields of science, technology, engineering, and mathematics. The announcement was made on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Feniex Industries achieves $200 million in sales, doubling growth pace in less than a decade.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 18, 2025, Feniex Industries, a renowned company specializing in emergency vehicle warning technology, has revealed that they have reached a significant milestone by exceeding $200 million in total sales. It took the company ten years to achieve their first $100 million in sales back in 2020, and remarkably, they managed to double that figure in a shorter time frame.

news.headline: American Skin Association awarded Candid's 2025 Platinum Seal of Transparency and Charity Navigator's Four-Star Rating.
news.summary: In New York on February 18, 2025, the American Skin Association (ASA) revealed their achievement of receiving Candid's 2025 Platinum Seal of Transparency and a Four-Star Rating from Charity Navigator. This recognition is significant as Candid is known as the world's largest provider of information on nonprofit organizations. It highlights the ASA's commitment to transparency and effectiveness in their operations.

news.headline: McGuinn Homes Inc restructures operations for growth in South Carolina markets, appointing Division Presidents.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 18, 2025, in West Columbia, S.C., McGuinn Homes Inc. revealed plans for a corporate restructuring aimed at enhancing its presence in South Carolina. The company plans to bolster its expansion efforts in three key markets within the state. As part of this restructuring, McGuinn Homes Inc. will be appointing Division Presidents to oversee operations in each of these standalone markets. This strategic move is intended to strengthen the company's foothold and drive growth in South Carolina.

news.headline: Hydron Energy receives funding support from NRC IRAP for rare gas production and air capture solution.
news.summary: In North Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 18, 2025, Hydron Energy Inc. revealed they are tackling carbon emissions in challenging sectors and disclosed they are obtaining financial backing from the National Research Council of Canada Industrial Research Assistance Program (NRC IRAP) and Innovate Canada.

news.headline: Swedish brand Stinaa.J introduces orthopedic footwear to U.S. with Fall collection on Bloomingdales.com & Nordstrom.com.
news.summary: A Swedish orthopedic footwear brand, Stinaa.J, launched its Fall collection on Bloomingdales.com and Nordstrom.com for its U.S. debut in late 2024. The brand is known for redefining the connection between science, design, and overall body wellness.

news.headline: Verb Biotics' LP815™ GABA Probiotic benefits companion animals' behavior; offers natural solution. Est. 2/18/25.
news.summary: As more and more pet guardians look for natural and scientifically proven remedies to address behavioral issues such as anxiety and aggression in their pets, there is a growing interest in groundbreaking microbiome-based interventions. In Boulder, Colorado, on February 18, 2025, Verb Biotics LLC, a leading biotech company, is gaining recognition for its innovative approach in this field.

news.headline: BASE FOOD enters U.S. market, debuts BASE Cookies; aims for health-conscious Americans. TOKYO, Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Japanese food-tech company, BASE FOOD, Inc., aims to reach health-conscious American consumers and potential partners in the United States by offering nutrient-enhanced products. The Tokyo-based company made this announcement on February 18, 2025. BASE FOOD, Inc. is known for its innovative approach in the food-tech sector and plans to introduce products with boosted nutrients. This move is expected to capture the interest of a wide range of Americans looking for healthier food alternatives.

news.headline: MSI celebrates 50 years as a top supplier of flooring, countertops and more in North America.
news.summary: Orange, California - M S International, Inc. (MSI), the top provider of flooring, countertops, wall tile, and hardscaping products in North America, proudly reveals that this year signifies the company's 50th year in operation. The company was initially established in the year 1975, and it has since become a market leader in the industry. Celebrating half a century of success and growth, MSI continues to deliver quality products and services to its customers.

news.headline: Creative Science offers free lifetime registration for pets affected by Save This Life microchip registry shutdown in 2025.
news.summary: In Orange City, Iowa, as of February 18, 2025, Creative Science®, a renowned provider of animal health products, is taking action to assist pet owners, veterinary clinics, and shelters impacted by the closure of the Save This Life (STL) pet microchip database. The company's reliable microchip services are being offered to help mitigate the challenges caused by the shutdown of the STL registry.

news.headline: Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson's brand PAPATUI launches Ageless Action Under Eye Patches nationwide. #MensCare #Innovation
news.summary: Recently, PAPATUI has introduced its latest product, the Ageless Action Under Eye Patches, across the country. Founded by Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson, PAPATUI Men's Care is making strides in the men's grooming industry. The launch of the new product comes as the brand seeks to cater to the needs of male consumers. This announcement was made on February 18, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Robinhood plans to launch Singapore crypto offerings in 2025 through Bitstamp Ltd for $200 million, expanding global growth.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets Inc is set to offer crypto services in Singapore by 2025 through a Bitstamp Ltd subsidiary. The company made this announcement following the acquisition of Bitstamp for $200 million in June 2024. Robinhood plans to comply with regulatory guidance and launch their crypto offerings in Singapore by 2025. According to an interview with Robinhood Crypto's vice president and general manager Johann Kerbrat, the company aims to leverage Bitstamp's licenses with Singapore and institutional business for this endeavor. This expansion is part of Robinhood's strategy to tap into international markets and broaden its crypto product offerings.

news.headline: Former OpenAI CTO, Mira Murati, co-founds Thinking Machines Lab, an AI startup, after leaving OpenAI in [year].
news.summary: After departing from OpenAI in the previous year, Mira Murati has played a key role in founding the Thinking Machines Lab, a fresh startup focused on artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Ukraine considers gas imports for the upcoming season to boost storage levels. #energy #Ukraine
Trump Administration is planning to lay off at least 40% of the workers at the Federal Housing Administration.
Dominion Lending Centres Inc. extends credit facility with Toronto-Dominion Bank to 2030 from 2026.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Dominion Lending Centres Inc. (TSX:DLCG) has announced the amendment and extension of its credit facilities with The Toronto-Dominion Bank starting February 18, 2025. The credit facilities' maturity date has been pushed from December 19, 2026, to February 18, 2030.

news.headline: Asia Pacific loyalty programs market to double from $30.81B in 2024 to $60.03B by 2029. 16.3% annual growth expected in 2025. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: A report titled "Asia Pacific Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The loyalty market in the Asia Pacific region is projected to see a 16.3% annual growth, with an estimated value of US$35.83 billion by 2025. Over the years, the loyalty market in this region has shown a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) in value terms.

news.headline: Moderna reports Q4 EPS loss $(2.91), Q4 sales $966M vs last year's $2.81B. 2025 revenue outlook $1.5-2.5B. Vaccine study Phase 3 fully enrolled. FDA clinical hold due to 1 GBS case.
news.summary: Moderna Inc. reported a fourth-quarter EPS loss of $(2.91), missing the consensus of $(2.62) compared to an EPS income of $0.55 a year ago. Quarterly sales were $966 million, down from $2.81 billion a year ago but beat the consensus of $942.8 million. Moderna reiterated its 2025 revenue outlook as $1.5 billion to $2.5 billion versus a consensus of $2.43 billion. They expect $0.2 billion in revenue in the first half of the year. A Phase 3 study for their norovirus vaccine is fully enrolled in the Northern Hemisphere, with preparations underway for the Southern Hemisphere. The trial is on an FDA clinical hold following a report of Guillain-Barré syndrome, under investigation. RBC Capital coverage available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: MicroStrategy Inc. Chairman Michael Saylor states institutional investors need to allocate more capital to Bitcoin. New regulations allow holding Bitcoin on balance sheets, pushing for transparency and clarity in financial reports. Saylor compares Bitcoin's growth to Apple and Google's impact on communication and information access.
news.summary: MicroStrategy Inc. Executive Chairman Michael Saylor expressed the view that institutional investors are not allocating enough capital to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). He believes that due to its increasing acceptance as a financial asset, there is still room for more investment. Saylor mentioned that new regulations are now enabling companies to hold Bitcoin on their balance sheets, with the Financial Accounting Standards Board's fair value accounting rules requiring cryptocurrencies to be reported at fair market value. This move is seen to bring more transparency to companies' financial reports. Saylor compared Bitcoin's growth to historical technological shifts and suggested that its adoption could position it as a treasury reserve asset for corporations. This news was outlined on Benzinga.com.

Fed's Barr: The Fed uses AI and experimenting in controlled ways.
Nvidia (NVDA) stock analysis features top seven stocks with Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, and Tesla.
news.summary: Is Nvidia (NVDA) a buy now? Along with Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, and Tesla, Nvidia is one of the seven stocks being watched. Current Nvidia stock quotes and company news can be found in the latest chart analysis. Stay updated with Investor's Business Daily for more information.

news.headline: Millennials are changing investment trends, focusing on stocks, ETFs, and personal finance to plan for retirement.
news.summary: Discover the latest insights on how individuals belonging to the millennial generation are choosing to invest their money and prepare for their retirement years. Analysis reveals intriguing trends in their investment choices, with a notable focus on stocks, ETFs, personal finance management, and strategies for addressing student loan obligations. This information, recently shared via Investor's Business Daily, sheds light on the unique approach millennials are taking towards building wealth and securing their financial future.

Blockaid secures $50M in Series B funding to boost R&D amid increasing demand for onchain security solutions.
news.summary: Blockaid is planning to allocate the funds towards research and development to support its growth, as the demand for onchain security tools is projected to increase.

news.headline: Ataya and iBwave collaborate to simplify private 5G network design with Chorus platform and iBwave Express, speeding up deployment.
news.summary: Ataya, a universal connectivity provider, based in Santa Clara, California, has partnered with network planning leader iBwave to enhance private 5G network design. This collaboration aims to streamline the design process, making it quicker and more cost-effective for enterprises. Through the integration of Ataya's Chorus platform with iBwave Express, businesses can benefit from a simplified workflow that expedites the deployment of private 5G networks. Ataya's Chorus platform eliminates complexities associated with private 5G deployment, requiring only a small cell radio and SIM card. This collaboration is set to revolutionize the private network sector, with the focus on efficiency and ease of use.

news.headline: Charter school backed by muni in Texas set to shut down, risking $25M debt.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 8.5%, marking an increase of 2.3% compared to last year. This equates to a total of 15.6 million people currently unemployed. The situation is particularly dire for young people, with youth unemployment reaching 18.2%. Additionally, the report highlighted a 4.7% decrease in job vacancies, further exacerbating the job market. Experts are concerned about the long-term implications of the rising unemployment rates and are calling for immediate government intervention to address the issue.

news.headline: Barr: made a lot of progress on inflation
Brahma acquires Metaphysic to advance AI product suite development. Deal to boost Brahma's AI content capabilities.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Brahma, a renowned AI and content technology company formed by the DNEG Group, disclosed its acquisition of Metaphysic, a prominent developer of AI content creation technologies. The acquisition was executed through a merger and is poised to expedite the progress of Brahma's AI-driven products for enterprises, IP rights-holders, and content creators in various sectors. This collaboration aims to enable these entities to produce top-tier content efficiently. The deal has significant implications for the industry and is anticipated to bring innovative solutions to the market.

news.headline: TheBestReputation moves to premier office space in Williamsburg's New Town area at the Truist Bank Building, a 60,000-square-foot Class A space.
news.summary: TheBestReputation, a prominent online reputation management company, has relocated to the esteemed Truist Bank Building in Williamsburg, VA. This strategic move highlights the firm's growth and sets the stage for further service enhancements. Situated in the bustling New Town area, the Truist Bank Building spans 60,000 square feet and accommodates several well-known businesses in the region. The company has secured a three-year lease at this prime location, signaling its commitment to expansion and upscale operations.

news.headline: BitGo launches OTC trading desk, processed billions in volume, built $100M lending book, with leading asset managers.
news.summary: BitGo, a prominent digital asset infrastructure provider and the largest independent qualified custodian globally, unveiled the debut of its all-encompassing OTC trading desk based in Palo Alto, California. The platform, which has been operating discreetly since the start of 2024, has facilitated trading activities amounting to billions in volume. Moreover, it has established a lending portfolio exceeding $100 million, catering to prominent asset managers. Matt Ballensweig, previously associated with Genesis and Bridgewater, along with Stefan Von Haenisch, is leading this initiative.

news.headline: Former OpenAI CTO, Mira Murati, launches her AI start-up, Thinking Machines Lab, after leaving OpenAI last year.
news.summary: A former OpenAI employee, Mira Murati, has played a key role in the creation of a new artificial intelligence startup called Thinking Machines Lab after departing from OpenAI the previous year.

news.headline: Fed's Barr: It's not good to put Fed in crosshairs of potential fight.
Dragos named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS Protection Platforms. Evaluated against 15 criteria, among 17 vendors.
news.summary: In Hanover, Maryland, Dragos, Inc., a prominent cybersecurity company specializing in protecting operational technology (OT) environments, was revealed as a Leader in the inaugural Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS (Cyber-Physical Systems) Protection Platforms. The Dragos Platform, an advanced OT-native technology, played a key role in this recognition. Gartner's assessment, which included 17 vendors assessed against 15 criteria on two key axes, underlined Dragos' strong position in the industry. Its comprehensive OT cyber threat intelligence and exceptional cybersecurity proficiency were highlighted as significant strengths.

news.headline: ValOre to acquire all shares of South Atlantic Gold to create a 99,924-hectare precious metals district in Brazil for 38,500,000 ValOre shares worth approx CAD$2.7M.
news.summary: ValOre Metals Corp. and South Atlantic Gold Inc. recently disclosed an agreement on February 14, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia. ValOre, traded as TSX-V: VO, OTCQB: KVLQF, Frankfurt: KEQ0, will be acquiring all outstanding common shares of South Atlantic. The transaction involves 38,500,000 ValOre common shares issued for the South Atlantic shares, valued at about CAD$2.7M based on the February 14, 2025, closing price. The parties have until February 28, 2025, to finalize a binding agreement for the acquisition.

news.headline: U.S. home prices grew by 0.6% in January, faster than the preceding months, per Redfin report.
news.summary: In Seattle, according to data released by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), U.S. home prices saw a 0.6% increase in January compared to the previous month on a seasonally adjusted basis. This growth rate was slightly higher than the 0.5% growth seen in each of the three preceding months. The Redfin Home Price Index (RHPI), based on the repeat-sales pricing method, reported that the last time home prices rose at a faster pace was in November 2023 at 0.7%. This information underscores the upward trend in housing market prices.

news.headline: Brookfield considering investing $1B in Spring Education firm - report.

Unprecedented token creation in January with over 600,000 new tokens prompts concerns of market saturation. CoinGecko warns of potential 1 billion tokens in 5 years, up from 50,000/month in 2022. Rise attributed to new incubators like Pump.fun changing crypto market dynamics.
news.summary: The number of new tokens being created in the cryptocurrency space has reached unprecedented levels, with over 600,000 tokens launched in January 2024 alone. This surge in token creation has raised concerns about market saturation and the future of altcoin investment. CoinGecko's COO, Bobby Ong, highlighted this record-breaking figure and warned that if this trend continues, there could be 1 BILLION tokens in existence within the next 5 years. In 2022, the average number of tokens created per month was around 50,000, indicating a significant increase in token volume. One factor contributing to this surge is the rise of token incubators like Pump.fun, which has made the token launch process more accessible. This rapid increase in token creation is fundamentally reshaping the dynamics of the crypto market, according to Ong.

news.headline: 27 counterparties take $77.817 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
FAVO Capital Inc. filed Form S-1 for Nasdaq uplisting, offering financing to SMBs, announced on Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on February 18, 2025, FAVO Capital, Inc. (OTC: FAVO), which offers alternative financing to small and medium-sized businesses, disclosed its submission of a Form S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This strategic move is part of their initiative to transfer to the Nasdaq Capital Market.

news.headline: Norway indicts four in $87M crypto scam; victims lured to invest in fake "products" with crypto and stocks.
news.summary: Individuals were reportedly swindled in a suspected Ponzi scheme, where they were persuaded to invest in fictitious “product packages” that included cryptocurrencies and stocks.
